reviews.comment:
Un empleado me hechó de adentro porque justo ese día no había comprado nada. Le molestaba que estuviera adentro más de lo que le molestaría verme a la intemperie, ustedes juzguen si ese tipo de tratos son humanos, solidarios o absolutamente miserables.

(Translated by Google)
An employee kicked me out because I hadn't bought anything that day. He was more bothered by my being inside than he would be by seeing me outside. You be the judge of whether that kind of treatment is humane, compassionate, or utterly despicable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRaUx6RUtnEAE
